mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_knowledge_base ( tenant_id, knowledge_id, name, description, embedding_model, chunk_size, chunk_overlap, document_count, status, created_by, default_chunk_strategy, chunk_config_json, index_type, index_params_json, search_strategy, search_params_json, multi_stage_params_json, monitoring_params_json, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{knowledgeId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{embeddingModel}, #{chunkSize}, #{chunkOverlap}, #{documentCount}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{defaultChunkStrategy}, #{chunkConfigJson}, #{indexType}, #{indexParamsJson}, #{searchStrategy}, #{searchParamsJson}, #{multiStageParamsJson}, #{monitoringParamsJson}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_knowledge_base SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, embedding_model = #{embeddingModel}, chunk_size = #{chunkSize}, chunk_overlap = #{chunkOverlap}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_knowledge_base SET default_chunk_strategy = #{defaultChunkStrategy}, chunk_config_json = #{chunkConfigJson}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId}
UPDATE t_knowledge_base SET index_type = #{indexType}, index_params_json = #{indexParamsJson}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId}

UPDATE t_knowledge_base SET search_strategy = #{searchStrategy}, search_params_json = #{searchParamsJson}, multi_stage_params_json = #{multiStageParamsJson}, monitoring_params_json = #{monitoringParamsJson}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, knowledge_id, name, description, embedding_model, chunk_size, chunk_overlap, document_count, status, created_by, default_chunk_strategy, chunk_config_json, index_type, index_params_json, search_strategy, search_params_json, multi_stage_params_json, monitoring_params_json, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM t_knowledge_base WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, knowledge_id, name, description, embedding_model, chunk_size, chunk_overlap, document_count, status, created_by, default_chunk_strategy, chunk_config_json, index_type, index_params_json, search_strategy, search_params_json, multi_stage_params_json, monitoring_params_json, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM t_knowledge_base WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_knowledge_base WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT knowledge_id FROM t_knowledge_base WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ENABLED' AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, knowledge_id, name, description, embedding_model, chunk_size, chunk_overlap, document_count, status, created_by, default_chunk_strategy, chunk_config_json, index_type, index_params_json, search_strategy, search_params_json, multi_stage_params_json, monitoring_params_json, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM t_knowledge_base WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
